Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: pale gray-tinted skin, broad compact face, squinting sensitive eyes, low-light adapted
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: A human with pale gray-tinted skin and a broad compact face. Their eyes are squinting and sensitive, adapted for low-light underground environments.

Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: (completely bald:1.3), gaunt thin face, pale fragile skin, elongated delicate features
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: A completely bald human with a gaunt thin face and pale fragile skin. Their features are elongated and delicate, giving an ethereal high-tech appearance.

Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: muscular soldier, (blood red eyes:1.3), stern military expression, intimidating stare
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: A muscular soldier with blood red eyes and a stern military expression. They have an intimidating stare and powerful build, like a genetically engineered warrior.

Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: pale vampiric face, (sharp visible fangs:1.2), red glowing eyes, beautiful but sinister
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: A pale vampiric face with sharp visible fangs and red glowing eyes. Beautiful but sinister, with an aristocratic and otherworldly presence.

Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: (heavy pronounced brow ridge:1.3), broad thick neck, primitive robust features, low sloped forehead
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: A human with a heavy pronounced brow ridge and a low sloped forehead. They have a broad thick neck and primitive robust features, like an ancient hominid.

Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: (anthropomorphic pig-person:1.3), (large pink pig snout:1.3), (large pink pig ears:1.2), pink mottled skin, jowly cheeks
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: An anthropomorphic pig-person with a large pink pig snout and large pink pig ears. They have pink mottled skin and jowly cheeks, resembling a humanoid pig.

Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: (reddish orange skin:1.3), (two prominent black horns on forehead:1.3), sharp angular face, glowing eyes, fanged smile
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: A humanoid with reddish orange skin and two prominent black horns growing from their forehead. They have a sharp angular face, glowing eyes, and a fanged smile.

Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: gaunt sickly face, grey sallow pollution-damaged skin, hollow cheeks, weary haggard expression
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: A human with a gaunt sickly face and grey sallow pollution-damaged skin. Their cheeks are hollow with a weary haggard expression, scarred by harsh wasteland conditions.

Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: (anthropomorphic wolf-person:1.3), (entire face covered in thick brown fur:1.4), (animal snout:1.2), pointed animal ears, broad imposing head and shoulders, fierce expression
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: An anthropomorphic wolf-person whose entire face and head are covered in thick brown fur. They have a pronounced animal snout, pointed animal ears, and a broad imposing head with a fierce expression.

Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.prompt: (strikingly beautiful elven features:1.2), flawless pale skin, delicate expressive face, soft white hair, otherworldly
Avatar.AIGenPromptDef.pollinationsPrompt: A strikingly beautiful human with elven features, flawless pale skin, and a delicate expressive face. They have soft white hair and an otherworldly serene presence.
white hair, striking pale platinum white
bright red eyes, glowing crimson irises
pale white eyes, colorless irises
deep ink black skin
slate gray skin
pale sheer white skin
bright blue skin
purple skin
green skin
large cheeks and a heavy prominent jaw, neanderthal-like features
a large prominent forehead with heavy brow ridge
a flat upturned pig-like nose
large floppy pig-like ears
a gaunt skull-like head with hollow cheeks and prominent bone structure
